docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BALI, AHNA E. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC., A CALIF. CORP.
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BALI, AHNA E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN TASTING INSTITUTE INC., A CALIF. CORP. $3,383.80 PRINCIPAL, $83.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,466.80
